name: com.bizsim.google.play.appupdate
displayName: BizSim Google Play In-App Updates Bridge
description: Unity bridge for the Google Play In-App Updates API (v2.1.0). Supports both flexible (background download) and immediate (blocking) flows with install state streaming and a mock provider for editor testing.

samples.description: Full bootstrap with policy engine, preload, flexible/immediate flows, remind-later, and download progress adapter.
Pre-configured mock scenarios covering both flows and resume-in-progress.
Reference IAppUpdateAnalyticsAdapterV2 implementation logging all 25 events to Firebase Analytics.
Pre-configured IAppUpdateConfigSource ScriptableObjects for common update policies (immediate-only, staleness-gated, session+staleness hybrid).
